headline: Blackstone (BX) Stock After Recent Rebound Are Current Valuations Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Blackstone's current share price still lines up with its fundamentals, it helps to start by looking closely at what the market has been pricing in recently and how that compares with different valuation methods. Blackstone closed at US$122.79, with the stock up 6.4% over the past week and 2.7% over the past month, yet still showing a year to date decline of 22.7% and a 1 year decline of 6.7%. This contrasts with longer term gains of 47.9% over 3 years and 51.1%...

headline: Rare Buying Opportunity: Discounted Elite Dividend Machines With Major Macro Tailwinds
summary: Whenever I can buy an elite dividend machine with major macro tailwinds at a big discount, I jump at the opportunity. I list 3 of these rare, compelling buying opportunities in this article.
